message:
Here's a clear picture of exactly what's happening and why. Let me give you a full update:

---

## 🏭 Physical Design — Status Update

The PnR flow has been **restarted and is running autonomously in the background**. Here's what changed and what's happening:

### Synthesis Scope (per your instruction)

The flow synthesises exactly the right set of modules — everything in the wrapper RTL hierarchy except the three excluded categories:

| Category | Modules | Treatment |
|---|---|---|
| **Custom RTL** ✅ synthesised | `mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v`, `compute_ss.v`, `mcu_chip.v` | Full synthesis → standard cells |
| **Hazard3 CPU** ✅ synthesised | 22 RTL files (`hazard3_core.v`, `hazard3_alu.v`, `hazard3_csr.v`, ...) | Full synthesis → standard cells |
| **OpenDAP SWD Debug** ✅ synthesised | 7 RTL files (`opendap_sw_dp.v`, ...) | Full synthesis → standard cells |
| **NC IP Library** ✅ synthesised | 48 files (`nc_gpio`, `nc_uart`, `nc_spi`, `nc_i2c` ×3, `nc_aes`, `nc_dmac`, `nc_mcu_fabric`, ...) | Compiled as RTL source |
| **CF_SRAM macros** ❌ excluded | `CF_SRAM_1024x32` (32 instances, hard macros) | **Black-boxed** — pre-characterised hard IP, placed as macro |
| **Digital library** ❌ excluded | `sky130_fd_sc_hd__*` standard cells | Technology mapping **target** used by Yosys — not synthesised as RTL |
| **I/O / Padframe** ❌ excluded | `padframe.v`, `sky130_fd_io_*` cells | Chip-top only; `padframe.v` also fails Yosys parse (`.DM[0]()` syntax unsupported in IO cell instantiation style) |

> `mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_chip.v` was also **added** in this run — it was previously missing from the VERILOG_FILES list.

### Synthesis Result (Step 77 — Completed ✅)
- **91,444 cells** total (32 CF_SRAM hard macros + ~91,412 sky130 standard cells)
- **Chip area:** 1,201,084 µm² (43.22% sequential)
- **Errors:** 0

### PnR Progress Right Now
| Step | Status |
|---|---|
| Synthesis (Yosys) | ✅ Done |
| Pre-PnR STA | ✅ Done |
| Floorplan | ✅ Done |
| PDN | ✅ Done |
| Global Placement | 🔄 **In progress** (overflow ~241, converging) |
| Detailed Placement → CTS → Global Routing → DRT | ⏳ Queued (~6–8 hrs) |
| Final GDS/LEF | ⏳ Pending (~16–30 hrs total remaining) |

The flow is running session-safely in the background as a nohup process. Once DRT converges and signoff steps complete, the final GDS and hardened macro LEF will appear in `runs/wrapper_run/final/`.

Would you like to do anything in parallel while PnR runs — such as reviewing the generated RTL, the verification dashboard, or the device spec? Or I can monitor and report back when each major step (detailed placement, routing) completes.
